hero.title: Pick exactly what your business needs.
hero.subtitle: No bundles. No bloated packages. Choose the services that solve your actual problems and add more when you're ready. Everything comes with flat-rate pricing and no surprises.

items.name: Website Creation
items.description: Custom business website with mobile optimization, lead capture forms, and contact integration.

items.name: Business Email
items.description: Microsoft 365 or Google Workspace setup with domain email configuration.

items.name: CRM Setup
items.description: CRM implementation, customer pipeline setup, lead tracking organization, and workflow onboarding.

items.name: Scheduling Implementation
items.description: Scheduling software setup, calendar syncing, automated reminders, dispatch workflow setup, and booking optimization.

items.name: Dashboard Analytics
items.description: Custom business dashboards for leads, sales, jobs, reviews, and operational KPIs.

items.name: Lead Capture Automation
items.description: Automated web forms, missed call text back setup, customer intake workflows, and notification systems.

items.name: Follow Up Automation
items.description: Automated follow ups, estimate reminders, customer communication workflows, and operational automations.

items.name: Review Management
items.description: Automated Google review requests and customer follow-up workflows to build your online reputation.

items.name: Subscription Support
items.description: Ongoing support, workflow adjustments, troubleshooting, software management, and optimization.

alwaysIncluded.title: Every project starts on the right foot.

cta.title: Let's figure it out together.
cta.subtitle: Book a free 30-minute consultation and we'll map out the right services for where your business is right now.
